_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
min_doctor_qualification: Diploma in Orthopedics with 5 years of experience
clinical_indications: Comminuted and displaced fracture of radial head

preauth.label: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure
X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right)- confirming the diagnosis

ppd_preauth.q: Were clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings and indication for procedure submitted?
X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right)- confirming the diagnosis submitted?
Were the clinical notes and x-ray report submitted are indicative of procedure?

cpd_claim.q: Was the invoice/barcode of implant submitted?
Were the clinical notes and x-ray report submitted are indicative of procedure being done?

common_queries: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, and indication for procedure not submitted.
X-ray not submitted or not labelled with patient ID, date, or side (Left/Right) for diagnosis confirmation.
Post-procedure imaging study (Xray) not submitted at claim stage.
Detailed procedure/operative note not submitted at claim stage.
Invoice or barcode of implant not submitted at claim stage.
Clinical notes and X-ray report submitted at pre-authorization are not indicative of the procedure.
Clinical notes and X-ray report submitted at claim are not indicative of the procedure being done.

clinical_key_pointers: Radial head replacement is frequently used in treatment of radial head fractures or sequela.
X-ray can be used to confirm the diagnosis.
surgical_options: Patient is positioned in a supine position. Usually, lateral approach is used for the procedure.
Careful resection of radial head and neck fragments.
Trim the radial neck to fit the prosthesis.
Medullary canal is opened to fit the prosthesis stem.
Stem diameter is determined and reaming of the collar is done.
Sizing of the prosthesis is done and prosthesis is checked for length and stability.
Repair of the annular ligament in case of rupture.
